full_text:
Fan Zeng (Zimin) 范曾 (子閔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fan Zeng (范曾), styledZimin (子閔). Serving under He Jin, he defeated Turbans in Nanyang. Fan Zeng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
